title: N8N SMS Filter Unknown Contacts Workflow
description: A ready-to-use n8n workflow template that filters incoming calls to identify unknown/unsaved contacts and sends SMS notifications only to numbers not in Google Contacts, eliminating manual exclusion lists.
gumroad_description:
You're missing calls that matter because your SMS filter is pinging you for contacts you already know.

---

Who this is for:
— Founders and solopreneurs who route calls through automation and need clean, noise-free alerts
— Operations people tired of maintaining manual exclusion lists that go stale immediately
— Anyone running n8n workflows who wants unknown-caller filtering done right, without rebuilding it from scratch

---

What's inside:
— A 9-node n8n workflow that checks every incoming number against your live Google Contacts before firing an SMS
— Importable JSON file — drop it into n8n and it works
— Plain-English setup guide so you're not reverse-engineering someone else's logic
— Zero static exclusion lists — your Contacts are the source of truth, always current

---

If you've wasted time tweaking brittle filter logic, this replaces that entirely.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
